title: Retrieve Email Data - Agari Phishing Defense
content:
Retrieve Email Data from one of the Integrations of Gmail, Mail Listener v2, EWS O365, Microsoft Graph Mail.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Agari pack (AgariPhishingDefense, partner-supported).

Inputs — Message Id: Message Id of email.; User Id: User Id of user..

Outputs — EmailData: From field, Html Text of body, Headers, Text of body, Subject of email..

Integrations/scripts used: Set, ews-get-items-as-eml, ews-search-mailbox, gmail-get-attachments, gmail-get-mail, mail-listener-get-email, mail-listener-get-email-as-eml, msgraph-mail-get-email, msgraph-mail-get-email-as-eml.
